svg.text: Log in with the barista or admin demo account, then retry the queue request with the bearer token.

text.font-family: Virgil, Segoe Print, Comic Sans MS, sans-serif
Virgil, Segoe Print, Comic Sans MS, sans-serif

svg.text: Log in again so the frontend stores a fresh JWT, or send Authorization: Bearer <token>.

text.font-family: Virgil, Segoe Print, Comic Sans MS, sans-serif
Virgil, Segoe Print, Comic Sans MS, sans-serif

svg.text: Confirm you are calling http://localhost/auth/login with JSON email and password.

text.font-family: Virgil, Segoe Print, Comic Sans MS, sans-serif

svg.text: Orders are created but no email appears

text.font-family: Virgil, Segoe Print, Comic Sans MS, sans-serif

svg.text: Check RabbitMQ health, notification-service logs, and MailHog at http://localhost:8025.

text.font-family: Virgil, Segoe Print, Comic Sans MS, sans-serif
Virgil, Segoe Print, Comic Sans MS, sans-serif

svg.text: Check order-service startup logs for migration or seed errors.

text.font-family: Virgil, Segoe Print, Comic Sans MS, sans-serif

svg.text: make check fails at Docker Compose config

text.font-family: Virgil, Segoe Print, Comic Sans MS, sans-serif

svg.text: Run docker compose version and confirm Docker is installed.
